subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the sovereign Lord Who hath, amidst the servants of the world, raised aloft the banner of "Verily, I am the Lord of existence." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مالکی را لایق که مابین مملوکهای عالم علم اننی انا مالک الوجود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
